response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, including C and C++ (National Instruments), but lacks the required 5+ years of professional C++ development specifically in capital markets or fixed-income systems. The resume shows no direct experience with Windows platform C++ development, SQL Server/Oracle, or domain expertise in fixed income/investment banking. While the candidate demonstrates strong technical versatility, they do not meet the core mandatory technical skills or domain requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive software development background across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly
concerns: No direct C++ development experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No SQL Server/Oracle experience mentioned (mandatory requirement)
No domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets (mandatory requirement)
